sourcesContent:
# Components: declarations, the member model, the static
# render DSL. Component member declarations lower into _init(props) in
# fixed order; render lowers to _create()/_setup() with one __effect
# per dynamic binding.

Counter = component
  count := 0
  @label
  @opt?
  @step := 1
  limit =! 100
  note = "plain"
  total ~= count * 2
  onClick = (e) ->
    count += step
  describe = ->
    "#{note}: #{count} of #{limit}"
  beforeMount = ->
    console.log "mounting"
  ~> console.log count
  render
    div.card
      h1 "Counter"
      = count
      span.badge total
      button @click, disabled: count > 5
        "Step"

Panel = component
  active := true
  render
    .shell
      div#main
        "id kid"
      .('grid', active && 'on')
      p class: "static"
      section $open: true, $my-thing: "x"
      article data-lucide: "search"
      form noValidate
      . role: "note"
        "dot attributes"
      .counter-display "hyphenated"
      = active

Badge = component
  @size: number
  @label: string = "x"
  @step: number := 1
  @name? := "anon"
  @nick?: string := "nn"
  onClick = -> 1
  render
    button @click
      "go"
    span
      = @name

Two = component
  render
    div "a"
    span "b"

# The dynamic layer: conditionals with a branch-root
# transition, a keyed loop, two-way binding, a ref, a render local.
Roster = component
  items := [{id: 1, name: "a"}]
  vis := true
  sel := ""
  el := null
  render
    section
      total = items.length
      = total
      if vis
        div ~fade
          "shown"
      else
        p "hidden"
      ul
        for item, idx in items
          li key: item.id
            = item.name
            span idx
      input type: "text", value <=> sel
      div ref: el
        "anchored"

Chooser = component
  n := 1
  render
    div
      switch n
        when 1
          span "one"
        when 2, 3
          span "few"
        else
          span "many"

Chart = component
  render
    svg viewBox: "0 0 10 10"
      circle cx: "5", cy: "5", r: "4"

# Composition: child components with the declared-prop contract
# (container / static / snapshot+updater), boolean shorthand, an
# explicit child event binding, keyed child rows, children through
# slot, extends + rest. (The offer/accept spellings stay out of the
# corpus — the token stream cannot carry the difference;
# the sexpr spot tier and the paired scenarios hold them.)
Chip = component
  @label := "c"
  fire = ->
    @emit "pick", @label
  render
    span.chip
      = @label

Deck = component
  name := "n"
  onPick = (e) ->
    name = e.detail
  render
    div.deck
      Chip label: name
      Chip label: "static", compact, @pick: @onPick
      Chip label: (name + "!")
      Chip label <=> name
      ul
        for item, i in ["a", "b"]
          Chip key: item, label: item

Frame = component
  render
    div.frame
      slot

Holder = component
  render
    Frame
      p "projected"

FancyBtn = component extends button
  @label := "go"
  render
    button
      = @label

GatedOrder = component
  order: { id: string } <~ @app.data.orders(params.id)
  snapshot := order
  render null
